core.label: Mojo Fundamentals
core.description: Python-like syntax with systems programming performance.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Mojo SDK. Mojo is a superset of Python designed for AI/ML performance.

topics.label: Variables (var, let)
topics.description: var for mutable, let for immutable. Optional type annotations for performance.

topics.label: Functions (fn vs def)
topics.description: def for Python-compatible, fn for strict Mojo functions with ownership semantics.

topics.label: Structs
topics.description: Value types with struct. Mojo structs are like Rust structs, not Python classes.

topics.label: Traits
topics.description: Define interfaces with trait. Similar to Rust traits or Swift protocols.

topics.label: Ownership & Borrowing
topics.description: owned, borrowed, inout parameter conventions. Memory safety without GC.

topics.label: SIMD & Vectorization
topics.description: First-class SIMD types and automatic vectorization for performance.

topics.label: Python Interop
topics.description: Import and use Python modules directly. Full Python ecosystem access.
